name: invoice_connectors_state

bank_account.purpose: Receive payouts by ACH or bank transfer.

stripe.purpose: Create payment links and route invoice payments.

paypal.purpose: Create payment links and accept PayPal payments.

whop.purpose: Route subscription and platform commerce activity.

quickbooks.purpose: Accounting and invoice-payment connector using the tenant's own QuickBooks login.

storage_policy.secrets: Cloudflare secrets or provider token vault
storage_policy.payment_artifacts: R2 when file-like, D1 when status-only

rules: Every tenant can have its own invoicing center and payout connectors.
Individuals and companies can connect bank-account payout destinations.
The maximum platform transaction fee is 5%.
QuickBooks is treated as a connector, not as a rebuilt accounting system.
No raw bank credentials or payment secrets are stored in D1.
Connector records must attach to the tenant or owner user.
